scoring_system.note: Internal scores (0-3) are NEVER displayed to users. Only traffic light indicators are shown.

GREEN.description: All 5 pillars score 2 or above, no red flags, no bracket flags indicating missing critical data.
GREEN.label: Review and Approve
GREEN.user_message: This note has been prepared to audit-ready standard.

ORANGE.description: Any pillar scores below 2, or bracket flags exist indicating missing data, but no red flags detected.
ORANGE.label: Review Required
ORANGE.user_message: This note requires additional information before it meets audit-ready standard.

RED.description: Any red flag detected, regardless of pillar scores. Note floats to top of list.
RED.label: Needs Attention
RED.user_message: An incident or concern has been detected in this note that requires your immediate attention.

pillars.name: Goal Linkage
pillars.description: Does the note reference a participant NDIS plan goal?

0.label: Not Met
0.description: No goal referenced at all. The note does not connect the support delivered to any NDIS plan goal.
0.bracket_flag: [GOAL LINK REQUIRED — specify the NDIS plan goal this activity supports]

1.label: Partially Met
1.description: Vague reference to a goal area (e.g., 'daily living') without specifying the actual goal.
1.bracket_flag: [SPECIFIC GOAL REQUIRED — the note references a goal area but not a specific NDIS plan goal]

2.label: Met
2.description: Specific goal referenced but not by exact name or number from the NDIS plan.

3.label: Exceeded
3.description: Specific NDIS plan goal referenced by name or number (e.g., 'Goal 2: Increase independence with daily living tasks').

examples.good: Support was provided in accordance with Goal 2: Increase independence with household management and daily living tasks.

pillars.name: Participant Voice
pillars.description: Does the note capture what the participant said, chose, or preferred?

0.label: Not Met
0.description: No participant perspective captured. The note is entirely from the worker's perspective.
0.bracket_flag: [PARTICIPANT RESPONSE REQUIRED — document the participant's observable response to the session]

1.label: Partially Met
1.description: Worker's interpretation of participant's feelings without direct evidence (e.g., 'seemed happy').

2.label: Met
2.description: Participant's preferences or choices documented (e.g., 'participant chose to walk to the shops').

3.label: Exceeded
3.description: Direct quotes or specific participant-directed decisions documented (e.g., 'participant stated she would like to continue this activity next week').

examples.good: The participant verbally confirmed satisfaction with the session and indicated a preference to continue this routine at the next visit.

pillars.name: Measurable Outcomes
pillars.description: Are there specific, observable outcomes documented?

0.label: Not Met
0.description: No outcomes documented. The note does not describe what was achieved.
0.bracket_flag: [OUTCOME REQUIRED — describe the observable outcome of this session]

1.label: Partially Met
1.description: General statement about how the session went (e.g., 'session went well').

2.label: Met
2.description: Specific observable outcomes described (e.g., 'participant completed three of five meal preparation steps independently').

3.label: Exceeded
3.description: Quantifiable or clearly measurable outcomes with comparison to baseline (e.g., 'participant completed 3 of 5 steps independently, up from 1 of 5 last month').

examples.good: The participant independently selected grocery items from a prepared list, completing the task without physical assistance for the first time.

pillars.name: Support Delivered
pillars.description: Is the actual support activity clearly described?

0.label: Not Met
0.bracket_flag: [SUPPORT DESCRIPTION REQUIRED — describe the specific support activities delivered during this session]

1.label: Partially Met
1.description: Vague description of support type (e.g., 'helped with tasks').

2.label: Met
2.description: Clear description of specific support activities (e.g., 'assisted with meal preparation including planning the week's menu').

3.label: Exceeded
3.description: Detailed description with duration, method, and participant engagement level (e.g., 'assisted with meal preparation for 45 minutes, providing verbal prompts only while participant completed all physical tasks independently').

examples.good: The support worker assisted participant with meal preparation, including planning the week's menu and preparing a cooked breakfast. The participant directed the session, choosing the menu items and completing the majority of preparation steps independently with verbal guidance only.

pillars.name: Risk & Safety
pillars.description: Are any safety concerns or incidents properly flagged?

0.label: Not Met
0.description: No safety information included in the note.
0.bracket_flag: [SAFETY STATEMENT REQUIRED — confirm whether any incidents, medication events, or safety concerns occurred during this session]

1.label: Partially Met
1.description: Generic safety statement without specifics (e.g., 'no issues').

2.label: Met
2.description: Specific safety observations documented (e.g., 'no incidents, medication events, or safety concerns were observed').

3.label: Exceeded
3.description: Comprehensive safety assessment with specific observations and nil-incident confirmation covering incidents, medication, and environmental safety.

examples.good: No incidents, medication events, or safety concerns were observed or reported during this session.
